filters.note: Zone-map skip: ~85% of 916 blocks skipped; ~137 blocks qualify
Most selective row-level filter; checked first within qualifying blocks
int32 range; needed for boundary blocks; ~80-100% pass rate inside fully-qualified 1994 blocks

late_materialization.rationale: Zone map already skips 85% of blocks. Within qualifying blocks, loading all 4 columns in a fused pass is simpler and avoids random-access gather penalty. Block width = 65536 rows × (4+8+8+8)=28 bytes = 1.75MB per block, fits in cache.

scan_strategy.note: Outer loop over blocks with zone-map skip; inner loop fuses all 3 row-level predicates + accumulation in one pass

parallelism.note: #pragma omp parallel reduction(+:revenue) with dynamic schedule over 916 blocks; ~137 qualifying; imbalance is low because non-qualifying blocks are trivially cheap

precision.rationale: SUM(l_extendedprice * l_discount) is a two-column derived expression; C29 int64_t-cents does NOT apply; use long double per C35

date_constants.init: gendb::init_date_tables() called once at top of main()
